\begin{align*} a_{0} \amp = \frac{(f, 1)}{(1, 1)}=\frac {1}{2l} \int_{-l}^{l} g(x) \, dx,\\ a_{n}\amp = \frac{(f, \cos \left(\frac{n \pi x}{l}\right))}{(\cos \left(\frac{n \pi x}{l}\right),\cos \left(\frac{n \pi x}{l}\right))} = \frac 1l \int_{-l}^{l} g(x) \cos \left(\frac{n \pi x}{l}\right) \, dx \text{ for } n\ge 1,\\ b_{n} \amp =\frac{(f, \sin \left(\frac{n \pi x}{l}\right))}{(\sin \left(\frac{n \pi x}{l}\right),\sin \left(\frac{n \pi x}{l}\right))} = \frac{1}{l} \int_{-l}^{l} g(x) \sin \left(\frac{n \pi x}{l}\right) \, dx \text{ for } n\ge 1, \end{align*}
in-context
